title: Ore Crops
description: A datapack that adds ore crops.
body: ![Everything the mod adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d4mFh9oZ/images/bac7fb772b665df2a129fe4a696ba69ac95ebddd.png) # Mod Status This datapck is currently being updated. Newer versions should soon arrive. If you have any suggestions for the datapack you can join the discord server. # Installation Requirements This datapack requires the ressourcepack to work correctly! **[Download it here!](https://github.com/HackFight/Ore-Crops/releases/download/Release/ore_crops-1.1-ressourcepack-1.18+.zip)** # About This datapack adds wheat crops that grow ores instead of wheat. ![Seal of compatibility and quality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05519ba2ba36da153937d0dd0c72933ce39fa035.png) # How to To craft these special seeds you need to **drop** a wheat seed and a block of the mineral you want on an anvil. For quartz and netherite you'll need to use warts instead of seeds and for the netherite wart you only need to use two ingots instead of a block of netherite. # Development ### Developers _HackFight, Stoupy_ ### Artist _HackFight_ # Support
